key.name: streamers
key.description: A comma separated list of account names to follow. Prefix with kick: for Kick streamers, youtube: for YouTube streamers.

key.name: opencmd
key.description: The command executed when clicking on a Twitch streamer (use %streamer% for the login name).

key.name: kick-opencmd
key.description: The command executed when clicking on a Kick streamer (use %streamer% for the login name).

key.name: youtube-opencmd
key.description: The command executed when clicking on a YouTube streamer (use %streamer% for the channel handle).

key.name: interval
key.summary: The interval between updates in minutes
key.description: The interval between updates in minutes

key.name: title-length
key.description: Maximum number of characters shown for the stream title in the dropdown menu. Longer titles are truncated with an ellipsis.

key.name: avatar-size
key.description: Size of streamer profile pictures in the dropdown menu.

key.name: platform-icon-size
key.description: Height of the Twitch / Kick icons in the dropdown menu.

key.name: menu-spacing
key.description: Spacing between elements inside each streamer row.

key.name: font-size
key.description: Base font size for the streamer name. Other text scales relative to this.

key.name: show-platform-icons
key.description: Show a small Twitch or Kick icon next to the streamer name in the dropdown menu.

key.name: show-viewer-count
key.description: Show the viewer count in the dropdown menu.

key.name: notifications-enabled
key.description: Show a notification when a streamer comes online

key.name: notifications-game-change
key.description: Show a notification when a streamer changes games

key.name: hideplaylists
key.description: Hide active streams that are playlist streams (reruns)

key.name: hideempty
key.summary: Hide indicator if noone is streaming

key.name: sortkey
key.summary: Sort key for streams in menu

key.name: showuptime
key.description: Show how long the stream has been live
